seo.title: JewelryAI + Shopify Integration | AI Jewelry Photography for Shopify
seo.meta_description: Learn how to use JewelryAI with Shopify. Step-by-step setup guide, use cases, and workflow examples for jewelry e-commerce photography.

content.h1: How to Use AI Jewelry Photography with Shopify
content.introduction: Selling jewelry on Shopify? Professional product photography is crucial for conversions. This guide shows you how to integrate JewelryAI with your Shopify store to create stunning, AI-generated jewelry photos that drive sales. Follow our step-by-step setup to start generating professional imagery in minutes.

sections.heading: Why Shopify Sellers Need AI Photography
sections.body: Shopify is one of the most competitive platforms for jewelry sellers. High-quality product images are the #1 factor in purchase decisions. JewelryAI helps Shopify sellers stand out with professional on-model photography at a fraction of traditional costs.

sections.heading: Step-by-Step Setup Guide
sections.body: 1. Create your JewelryAI account. 2. Photo your jewelry products with a smartphone. 3. Upload to JewelryAI and select templates. 4. Download finished images. 5. Upload to your Shopify product listings. The entire workflow takes under 10 minutes per product.

sections.heading: Best Practices
sections.body: For optimal results on Shopify: use lifestyle/on-model shots as your primary image, include detail close-ups as secondary images, maintain consistent styling across your catalog, and optimize image dimensions for Shopify's requirements.

sections.heading: Workflow Examples
sections.body: Example 1: New product launch — generate 5 styled variations per SKU for A/B testing. Example 2: Seasonal refresh — update all listing images with seasonal styling without reshooting. Example 3: Scale operations — photograph 100+ new pieces in a day using AI batch processing.

faq.question: Does JewelryAI integrate directly with Shopify?
faq.answer: Currently, you download images from JewelryAI and upload them to Shopify. We're developing direct API integrations for seamless workflow automation. Sign up to be notified when the Shopify integration launches.

faq.question: What image sizes work best for Shopify?
faq.answer: We deliver images optimized for Shopify's requirements. Standard delivery includes web-optimized (2000x2000px), social media (1080x1080px), and print-ready (4000x4000px) formats.

faq.question: Can I use JewelryAI for all my Shopify product photos?
faq.answer: Yes! Many sellers use JewelryAI as their primary photography solution for Shopify. Our unlimited revision policy and fast turnaround make it ideal for maintaining a professional-looking store.

content.call_to_action: Boost your Shopify jewelry sales with AI photography. Start your free trial at JewelryAI.

structured_data.name: How to Use JewelryAI with Shopify

workflow_examples.title: Bulk Processing
workflow_examples.description: Process 100+ products for Shopify in one session

workflow_examples.title: A/B Testing
workflow_examples.description: Generate multiple variations to test conversion rates
